title: Hidden __valid bool field on structs with invariant declarations
description: Structs with one or more invariant declarations get a compiler-injected __valid: bool field. Initialized to true at construction. Post-method invariant check becomes: 'if (self.__valid) { assert invariants }'. Field is inaccessible from user code. Stripped in release mode along with all invariant checks. Size cost: 1 bool per struct with invariants, debug mode only.
